title: philadelphus lewisii var. californicus
intro: Philadelphus lewisii var. californicus, also known as California Mock Orange, is a deciduous shrub native to the western United States and Canada. This plant is prized for its fragrant, showy white flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Philadelphus lewisii var. californicus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make a calming tea or applied topically to soothe skin irritations.
